pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically generates the target sheet text specifying the required frames for each target. verifier.py checks exactly these required frame numbers via TARGET_REQS.
setup_task.sh target sheet instructions require writing the observation log to this path, and export_result.sh checks this exact path.
setup_task.sh target sheet instructions require capturing the sky view to this path, and export_result.sh explicitly checks this path.
setup_task.sh clears and configures target subdirectories within this base directory.
setup_task.sh creates the marathon targets document at this exact path.
verifier.py docstring explicitly lists Occupation: Amateur Astronomer.
verifier.py docstring contextually implies observational astronomy.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a simulated environment using synthetic FITS imagery from the KStars/INDI CCD simulator. The target list (M1, M13, M27, M51, M57, M101) and their required exposure counts exactly match the generated observation sheet and the verifier TARGET_REQS dictionary. The expected output file paths for the observation log (/home/ga/Documents/marathon_log.txt), the final sky view capture (/home/ga/Images/marathon/sky_view_m101.png), and the base upload directory (/home/ga/Images/marathon) have all been explicitly confirmed against setup scripts, task instructions, and export_result logic.
